title: Encoding Specificity
script_summary: Exploring the science behind encoding specificity and how it shapes our memory recall.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about encoding specificity than social media does.
Encoding specificity explains why we remember things better in the same context where we learned them.
Imagine studying in a coffee shop. You might ace the test there, but struggle in a quiet classroom.
Research shows that matching the environment during recall enhances memory. It’s not just a coincidence!
So, next time you study, think about where you are. Your memory might thank you later.
Curious about more mind hacks? Hit follow for the latest science tips!
